title: "O How Love I Thy Law - Part 2" Psalm 119:159

notes.introduction: An exposition of Psalm 119:159 on the evidences that support a genuine love for the word of God, drawing on multiple verses throughout Psalm 119 as part two of a series on the Bible. Ten observable behaviors from the psalmist are examined as evidence that his declaration in Psalm 119:97 is substantiated by his life.

sections.heading: Evidence One and Two: Desire to Learn and Commitment to Obey
Evidence Three and Four: Memorizing and Meditating on the Word
Evidence Five and Six: Searching the Word and Delight in the Word
Evidence Seven and Eight: Longing for and Valuing the Word
Evidence Nine and Ten: Awe of the Word and Purpose to Speak It
William McPherson Illustration and Closing Challenge
